home.title: Exceptional catering for your events
home.subtitle: Local cuisine, tailored service and smooth coordination for every special moment.
home.text1: Discover our signature dishes, tasting menus and customization options for professional and private events.
home.text2: From elegant buffets to seated dinners, we adapt the experience to your brand and venue.
home.text3: Booking, coordination and logistics: our team handles everything.

corporate.title: Corporate Events
corporate.text: Gala dinners, product launches, seminars and professional receptions. We create a refined culinary experience adapted to your company's needs.

private.title: Private Events
private.text: Weddings, birthdays, family celebrations or private receptions: each moment is celebrated with creative cuisine and warm service.
highlights: Dedicated follow-up from first contact to event day

about.title: About Us
about.text: Le Coin Cuisine Traiteur is a dedicated team transforming your ideas into memorable culinary experiences. We work with fresh ingredients and local producers.

contact.title: Contact
contact.text: Tell us about your project and receive a custom proposal. We are available by email, phone or via the form below.
